hero.subtitle: Start from a template, bring in your data, and publish a polished screen.
hero.description: JaminView helps business teams, product managers, and delivery engineers turn complex screen development into a clear visual workflow.

value.title: Spend time on what you present, not on rebuilding the same layout
value.description: JaminView packages industry templates and flexible data mapping into one workflow, so non-technical teams can deliver presentation-ready dashboards in hours instead of weeks.

template.title: Template-first setup
template.body: Start from curated layouts for smart city, industrial IoT, finance, and more without designing from scratch.

data.title: Data ingestion
data.body: Import Excel, CSV, APIs, and mainstream databases with direct field mapping and instant preview.

editor.title: Visual editing
editor.body: Drag components freely, fine-tune chart styling, and configure immersive 3D maps and motion layers.

publish.title: Publish & share
publish.body: Generate links or embeds in one click with multi-screen support, private deployment options, and strong access control.

items.title: Sales Analytics Screen
items.subtitle: Track conversion, targets, and regional performance

items.title: City Operations Monitor
items.subtitle: Bring 3D geo-visualization into real business workflows

workflow.title: A transparent workflow built for delivery teams

steps.title: Choose a template
steps.body: Start with a layout that already matches your business scenario.

steps.title: Import data
steps.body: Drop in Excel files or connect APIs and preview how widgets respond instantly.

steps.title: Tune components
steps.body: Adjust colors, branding, motion, and presentation behavior without leaving the canvas.

steps.title: Publish the screen
steps.body: Push the final board to large displays or delivery platforms with one click.

scenarios.title: Built for diverse presentation scenarios

items.title: Weekly reporting boards
items.body: Roll up multidimensional metrics and replace slow PowerPoint reporting loops.

items.title: Sales command screens
items.body: Broadcast live national or regional orders to energize frontline teams.

items.title: Executive showroom demos
items.body: Use cinematic 3D presentation scenes to demonstrate digital transformation impact.

items.title: Production monitoring
items.body: Connect sensor streams and highlight manufacturing anomalies in real time.

scenarios.quote: JaminView reduced our delivery time from two weeks to two days and significantly improved client satisfaction.

cta.titleTop: Build a screen worth presenting first,
